description: Self-hosted AI cinema production studio replacing $400+/mo SaaS platforms with a node-based pipeline at API-cost-only pricing. The value layer is virtual cinematography — camera presets, lighting simulation, effects chains — not the models themselves.

personality_traits: cinematic vocabulary — speaks the language of film production
vocabulary_preferences: shot, sequence, scene (not clip, content, post)
render, composite, grade (not make, create, edit)
example_phrases: The models are commodities. The cinematography intelligence is the product.
Every production flows through five layers — generation, virtual production, audio, post, distribution.
RAG-driven camera presets, not prompt guessing.

visual.logo_usage: CTO to provide — logo files go in brand/assets/
visual.photography_style: Dark, cinematic, high-contrast. Shallow depth of field. Anamorphic lens character preferred. Noir and moody over bright and corporate.
visual.video_style: Cinematic color grading (LOG-to-Rec.709 or film stock emulation). Deliberate camera movement over static shots. Every frame should feel intentional — no generic stock footage aesthetic.

target_audience.primary_icp: Small-to-mid creative agencies and independent filmmakers who need cinema-quality AI video production without $200+/mo platform subscriptions
target_audience.secondary_icp: DTC brands and e-commerce businesses needing high-volume video content (product demos, avatar content, social shorts) at scale
pain_points: Platform subscriptions stack up ($400+/mo for Higgsfield + Arcads alone)
Credit-limited generation — pay per video, costs spike with volume
No real cinematography control — generic AI video output
Locked into platform UIs — can't customize or automate pipelines
Multi-platform publishing is manual and fragmented
desired_outcomes: Cinema-quality video at API-cost-only pricing (~$100-200/mo total)
Full cinematography control — camera, lighting, effects via RAG presets
Consistent brand identity across all video content

cinema_defaults._note: Populated in Phase 2 as RAG presets are built. These are starting-point defaults.
cinema_defaults.color_grading: Film stock emulation — warm highlights, lifted shadows. Avoid flat or oversaturated looks.
cinema_defaults.preferred_film_stock_emulation: Kodak Vision3 500T (tungsten, cinematic warmth) for interiors; Fuji Eterna Vivid 500 for exteriors
cinema_defaults.default_camera_style: ARRI Alexa 35 body + Cooke S7i prime lens set (characterful, organic rendering)
cinema_defaults.default_lighting_setup: Modified three-point: soft key at 45 degrees, minimal fill for contrast, subtle edge/backlight for separation

metadata.status: draft — awaiting CTO review of brand voice and visual identity
cto_review_needed: tagline — is 'AI Cinema Production Engine' the final tagline?
logo files — need to be added to brand/assets/
brand voice tone — confirm personality traits match Rob's vision
primary/secondary ICP — validate target audience descriptions
film stock defaults — confirm Kodak Vision3/Fuji Eterna preference
